summary: Quote router command examples for safe copy-paste
description: Use shell-safe quoting in bare-go and router command examples, and document repo_shell for custom adapter templates.
acceptance: Generated command examples safely quote repository paths and free-form brief text.
Custom adapter help recommends repo_shell while preserving raw repo compatibility.

evidence.summary: TDD regression reproduces unsafe shell parsing and passes after shell_join; scripts/check-linux.sh: 73 passed and local verification ok; scripts/check-pilots.sh: standalone distribution and diverse pilots ok.
